description: Mexican drug trafficking and methamphetamine producing cartel founded in 1988 by José de Jesús Amezcua Contreras and his brothers. Based in Guadalajara, Jalisco, it controlled the methamphetamine trade by obtaining ephedrine from Thailand and India. The cartel was dismantled after the arrests of its leaders in 1997-1998 and later became a branch of the Sinaloa Cartel.

country_links.evidence_quote: By 1992 the Colima Cartel, through operations as a business, was able to establish amphetamine contacts in Switzerland , India , Germany and the Czech Republic
country_links.context: The Colima Cartel established amphetamine contacts in the Czech Republic.
